title: Perfectoid Descent — Scholze Tilting as Descent

analysis.object: T765: Perfectoid Descent — Scholze Tilting as Descent depth analysis

tilting.description: Scholze tilting: X in char 0 <-> X^flat in char p

tilting_as_descent.description: Tilting goes char 0 to char p (shadow) and back (lift) -- a descent operation

tropical_as_char_p.description: Tropical geometry IS the char p skeleton -- tropical = limit as p -> infty
tropical_as_char_p.reason: Tropical = combinatorial = EML-0 char p analog

perfectoid_tropical_bridge.description: Perfectoid tilting: char 0 algebraic -> char p tropical (shadow) -> lift back
perfectoid_tropical_bridge.reason: The path goes through char p = tropical

scholze_hodge_tate.description: Hodge-Tate decomposition in perfectoid: H^n = sum H^{p,n-p}(-p) -- Hodge-like

descent_from_perfectoid.description: If perfectoid lift from tropical to char 0 works, descent works
descent_from_perfectoid.reason: Perfectoid lift = the operation we need -- conditional

t765_theorem.description: T765: Perfectoid tilting provides tropical descent for ordinary varieties (Serre-Tate theory). General case conditional on crystalline comparison.
t765_theorem.reason: Major partial result: ordinary varieties covered by Scholze

analysis.theorem: T765: Perfectoid Descent — Scholze Tilting as Descent (S1044).

key_theorem: T765: Perfectoid Descent — Scholze Tilting as Descent (S1044).
